calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Validity Of Trust; Successor Trustees; Trust Assets; And For Order Transferring Decedent'S Omitted Assets To Trust
Off Calendar May-11-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Terry, via Zoom, in propria persona, Beneficiary.

The court and Mr. Terry briefly discuss the history of this matter with Mr. Terry advising that he opposes the petition. The court notes that the petitioners did not appear for the hearing this morning and accordingly, the petition is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
